creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Either nist or bipm will be authoritative.  I'm inclined to fetch from a list that includes these two. Nist has been there forever and bimp is likely going to be long term stable. Nrao was retired several years ago. It's the easy button... the idea of setting up a FreeBSD server for that seems like overkill. Not sure why we did ietf at all... but if we do a list, we are quite safe. If we really want to stand up a FreeBSD server we can add it to the list in a future release.

Just my two cents...
